user.description: How do you want to add your Nintendo Switch?

discovery.title: Search for Nintendo Switch
discovery.description:
Scanning your network for Nintendo Switch consoles with the sysmodule installed.

Make sure your Switch is turned on and the 'Home Assistant Switch' app is running if discovery fails.

discovery_confirm.title: Confirm Discovery
discovery_confirm.description:
Enter the API Token for {name} ({host}).

You can find the token in the 'Home Assistant Switch' app on your console.

manual_entry.title: Manual Connection
manual_entry.description:
Enter the connection details for your Nintendo Switch.

Make sure the 'Home Assistant Switch' app is open on your console to see the IP and Token.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect - check IP and ensure sysmodule is running
error.no_devices_found: No consoles found on your network. Try manual entry.
error.app_version_outdated: Homebrew App is outdated ({current_version} < {min_version}). Please update from GitHub.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Switch
